task_name: Settings Page + Logo Cropper + Danger Zone

strengths: Clean separation: shared validators in client/src/lib/settingsValidation.ts imported by both page and test
Path traversal guards in tryDeleteOldUploadedLogo (checks for '..' and prefix validation)
Proper URL.revokeObjectURL cleanup in handleCancelCrop and handleCroppedLogo prevents memory leaks
409 version_conflict handling mirrors existing card conflict pattern (toast + refreshSettings)
Lazy multer import via getUpload() keeps pure validator tests fast without requiring the multer package at collection time
Genuine TDD red phase: test imports from ./settingsValidation module, not defined inline

issues.description: settingsLoadError is never set on initial load failure — only reachable via handleRetryLoad. Initial refreshSettings() failure silently degrades to defaults.
handleConfirm catch block calls onCancel() on crop error, silently swallowing the failure without logging or surfacing to user.
